flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.5k → $39.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute are 66% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($102.1k vs $61.5k).
